headline: Bitcoin Surges Toward $78K Key Support Level

headline: Gym Stocks Surge 20% as Bars Decline

article.summary: As young people increasingly turn away from drinking alcohol, they’re spending more on gym memberships and classes: 30% more than just a year ago, according to market intelligence firm Mintel.
